nasb.text: This whole land will be a desolation and a horror, and these nations will serve the king of Babylon seventy years.

esv.text: This whole land shall become a ruin and a waste, and these nations shall serve the king of Babylon seventy years.

cnv.text: 這地要全變為荒廢，令人驚駭；這些國家要服事巴比倫王七十年。

ccb.text: 整片土地要变得荒凉可怕，他们要臣服于巴比伦王七十年。
